scripts.dev:stack: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend,recommendation -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:recommendation-service"
scripts.dev:all:fresh: npm run free:api && npm run dev:all
